extraction.one_line_summary: BENEDETTI Cesare won after being dropped on final cobbled climb, bridging back in final 700m while leaders Brambilla/Capecchi/Dunbar hesitated, taking first professional victory.
tactical_patterns: DUNBAR Eddie attacked first on cobbled Modello climb forcing splits, UAE Emirates showing offensive tactics despite losing stage.
BENEDETTI bridged in final 700m exploiting tactical stalemate among leaders who waited too long to launch sprint.
LOPEZ/LANDA attacked GC group 7:34 behind breakaway but only gained ~30 seconds, revealing insufficient aggression on medium mountain stages.
POORLANTS Prim entering pink jersey despite struggling initially on cobbled climb, UAE controlling race with offensive breakaway placement.

rider_signals.BENEDETTI Cesare: positive: First professional win after repeatedly dropped on climbs but superior descending/flat chase ability and tactical patience waiting until final sprint.
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: Initiating winning breakaway move on cobbled climb for Team Ineos shows GT maturity beyond pure domestique role.
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: Only took back ~30 seconds despite attacking GC group after 6:19 deficit shows insufficient recovery from previous disaster day.
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: Caught out losing 30 seconds when GC group split, poor positioning awareness on medium mountain stage.
rider_signals.POORLANTS Prim: neutral: Into pink jersey but visibly struggled on cobbled climb initially before recovering, vulnerability signal on technical climbing.
